headline: Cardinal Health Plans Accounting Leadership Shift As Growth Story Evolves
summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) announced the planned retirement of Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer Mary Scherer. The company has begun a search for her successor and plans to manage an orderly transition in its finance leadership. This leadership change affects oversight of financial reporting, controls, and accounting policy at Cardinal Health. Cardinal Health is a major player in healthcare distribution and related services, sitting between manufacturers, pharmacies,...
